name: Sugar Free Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add melted and cooled unsweetened chocolate to the cream cheese and beat until combined.
3. Stir in the sugar substitute and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Fold in the chopped pecans.
5. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square baking pan lined with foil.
6. Cover the pan with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
7. Cut the fudge into 16 squares once set.
8. Serve chilled.
Diabetic Exchanges: one serving = fat; also 147 calories, 84 mg sodium, 31 mg cholesterol, 5gm carbohydrate, 3gm protein, 14gm fat.
